title: New York Life Makes Tokenization Debut with Onchain High-Yield Bond Fund with Centrifuge
summary: New York Life, a major asset manager with $807 billion in assets, is tokenizing a high-yield corporate bond fund on the blockchain using Centrifuge's technology. This marks the firm's first tokenization move and a significant expansion of traditional finance into crypto beyond tokenized Treasury funds.
body:
New York Life, a asset management giant with $807 billion in assets under management, has made its tokenization debut by launching a tokenized high-yield corporate bond fund on the blockchain. The fund is built using Centrifuge's technology, marking a notable entry of traditional finance into the crypto space beyond tokenized Treasury funds.

The high-yield bond fund will be available on the blockchain, providing investors with a new way to access these assets. Centrifuge, known for its real-world asset tokenization platform, will facilitate the process, ensuring that the bonds are represented as digital tokens on the blockchain. This move comes as Wall Street increasingly explores the potential of tokenization to enhance liquidity and accessibility in traditional financial markets.

For everyday investors, this development means greater access to high-yield bond investments through blockchain technology. Tokenization can reduce barriers to entry, such as high minimum investment requirements and complex paperwork, making these assets more accessible to a broader range of investors. Additionally, the transparency and security offered by blockchain technology can provide investors with greater confidence in their investments.

This is not the first time traditional financial institutions have ventured into tokenization, but it is one of the most significant moves yet as it comes from a major insurer and asset manager. As more asset managers follow suit, we can expect to see a broader range of tokenized financial products becoming available. Investors should watch for further announcements from other major financial institutions as they explore the benefits of blockchain technology for asset management.

Read more → https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/06/29/new-york-life-makes-tokenization-debut-with-onchain-high-yield-bond-fund-with-centrifuge
twitterThread: Big news: New York Life ($807B AUM) just made its tokenization debut by launching a tokenized high-yield corporate bond fund on the blockchain with Centrifuge. This is a major step for traditional finance entering crypto beyond tokenized Treasuries.
The fund uses Centrifuge's real-world asset platform to bring high-yield corporate bonds onchain, making them more accessible and transparent for investors.

This debut from a top-tier asset manager could accelerate tokenization of credit products. Watch for other major players to follow. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-30-new-york-life-launches-tokenized-high-yield-bond-fund-on-blockchain
standaloneTweet: New York Life ($807B AUM) has made its tokenization debut with an onchain high-yield bond fund via Centrifuge. This could make high-yield investments more accessible to everyday investors and marks a significant expansion of tradFi into crypto.
